description: Personalize Hugo blog for liuchenyang (刘晨阳), add a dedicated skills/workflow content section, and improve frontend navigation so the existing 6 content categories are easy to access from the site.

userStories.title: Personalize hugo.toml with full configuration for liuchenyang
userStories.description: As liuchenyang, I want the site config to reflect my identity and surface every content section in the top navigation, so visitors land on a blog that is clearly mine and can browse all categories.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace /Users/bytedance/githubpro/AITechBlog/hugo.toml with a full config sourced from themes/hugo-theme-cleanwhite/exampleSite/config.toml (or config.toml.back) and adapted for liuchenyang
Set title to '刘晨阳的博客 | liuchenyang Blog' and SEOTitle / description / keyword to match (mention AI, LLM, Agent, skill 工作流, 工程实践)
baseURL stays 'https://lemon-little.github.io/AITechBlog/' (this is the github pages URL, do not change it)

Set sidebar_about_description to a short bilingual liuchenyang intro and remove the original 'sidebar_avatar' line that points to zhaohuabing.png (comment it out or replace with a placeholder path under /img/)
Replace [params.social] block: set github = 'https://github.com/lemon-little', email = 'liuchenyang@example.com' (placeholder), remove linkedin/stackoverflow/wechat values that point to zhaohuabing

Disable services that are tied to the original author: set algolia_search = false, artalk_enable = false, disqus_proxy = '', reward = false, page_view_counter = false, ba_track_id = '', googleAnalytics = ''
Remove all [[params.friend_link]] entries pointing to zhaohuabing's friends; leave the section empty or with a single placeholder commented out

Add params.addtional_menus entries for: SKILLS -> /post/skill-workflow/, 前沿追踪 -> /post/前沿追踪/, 项目沉淀 -> /post/项目沉淀/, 瞎鼓捣工具 -> /post/瞎鼓捣工具/, 基础牢固 -> /post/基础牢固/, 面试常考 -> /post/面试常考/, 经典品学 -> /post/经典品学/, ARCHIVE -> /archive/, NOTES -> /notes/, ABOUT -> /about/
No string 'zhaohuabing' or 'Huabing' or '赵化冰' remains in hugo.toml after the change
Running `hugo --minify` from the project root completes with exit code 0 and no fatal errors
Commit message: 'feat: US-001 - Personalize hugo.toml with full configuration for liuchenyang'
userStories.notes: Done in iteration 1 (2026-05-15). Hugo paginate setting was deprecated in v0.128 — replaced with [pagination] pagerSize block.

userStories.title: Rewrite About page for liuchenyang in English and Chinese
userStories.description: As liuchenyang, I want the About page to introduce me — not the previous theme author — so anyone visiting /about/ sees my real bio.
acceptanceCriteria: Rewrite /Users/bytedance/githubpro/AITechBlog/content/about/index.md so the body is liuchenyang's English bio: a short paragraph describing him as an engineer interested in AI, LLM, Agent, infrastructure, and skill workflows; remove all references to Huabing Zhao, Tencent Cloud, Istio, ONAP, Aeraki, and chongqing university
Rewrite /Users/bytedance/githubpro/AITechBlog/content/about/index-zh.md with the Chinese-language equivalent bio for 刘晨阳, also stripping all 赵化冰 references

Remove or replace the entire 'Publications', 'Presentations (Selected)', and 'Open Source Projects' tables in BOTH files. If kept, they must contain only placeholder rows or a single line like '_To be added._' / '_待补充。_' — they MUST NOT keep the original entries about Istio Service Mesh book, IstioCon, Aeraki Mesh, or hugo-theme-cleanwhite
Both files preserve the existing front matter (`---` block with `layout: page` and `multilingual: true`)
No string 'zhaohuabing', 'Huabing', '赵化冰', 'Aeraki', 'ONAP', or 'Istio' appears anywhere in content/about/ after the change (verify with `grep -ri`)
Running `hugo --minify` from the project root completes with exit code 0
Commit message: 'feat: US-002 - Rewrite About page for liuchenyang'
userStories.notes: Done in iteration 2 (2026-05-15). Replaced both about/index.md (en) and about/index-zh.md (zh) with liuchenyang's bio. Stripped Aeraki/Istio/ONAP/Tencent/Huabing references. Publications/Presentations/Open Source sections kept as '待补充。' placeholders so the table layout stays usable for later additions.

userStories.title: Add skill-workflow content section and section index pages for all categories
userStories.description: As liuchenyang, I want a dedicated content folder where I can accumulate my Claude / agent skill workflows, AND I want every existing post sub-folder to be a real Hugo section so visitors can browse each category from the menu without 404s.
acceptanceCriteria: Create directory /Users/bytedance/githubpro/AITechBlog/content/post/skill-workflow/ with an _index.md file. Front matter must set: layout = 'page', title = 'Skill 工作流沉淀', description = '收集和沉淀我的 Claude / Agent skill 工作流' . Body should briefly describe the section's purpose in Chinese (3-5 sentences).

Create at least one starter post inside content/post/skill-workflow/, e.g. how-i-use-skills.md, with proper front matter (layout: post, title, subtitle, date, author: '刘晨阳', image), and a short body explaining how liuchenyang uses skills. Use a real recent date (e.g. 2026-05-15).

For each of the 6 existing categories under content/post/ (基础牢固, 经典品学, 面试常考, 前沿追踪, 瞎鼓捣工具, 项目沉淀), create an _index.md with front matter (layout: page, title matching folder name, description) and a short Chinese description. Do NOT delete the existing README.md files — leave them as-is.
Verify that visiting /post/skill-workflow/, /post/基础牢固/, /post/前沿追踪/, /post/项目沉淀/, /post/瞎鼓捣工具/, /post/经典品学/, /post/面试常考/ all generate a corresponding HTML file under public/ after `hugo --minify`
Running `hugo --minify` from the project root completes with exit code 0 and produces public/post/skill-workflow/index.html
Commit message: 'feat: US-003 - Add skill-workflow section and section indexes'

userStories.title: Refresh homepage description, README, and remove stale theme demo content
userStories.description: As liuchenyang, I want the homepage and project README to describe my own blog, and I want the theme's demo readme post hidden so it stops showing on the front page as if it were my content.
acceptanceCriteria: Update /Users/bytedance/githubpro/AITechBlog/content/_index.md so title and description reflect liuchenyang's blog (e.g. title: '刘晨阳的博客', description mentions AI / Agent / skill 工作流)

Update /Users/bytedance/githubpro/AITechBlog/README.md so it briefly describes liuchenyang's blog, the tech stack (Hugo + cleanwhite theme + GitHub Pages), and links to the live site at https://lemon-little.github.io/AITechBlog/. Replace the current minimal '个人AI技术博客' line.
Set draft: true (or rename to a hidden file like _readme.md) on /Users/bytedance/githubpro/AITechBlog/content/post/readme.md so the cleanwhite theme demo post no longer appears on the homepage list
Set draft: true on /Users/bytedance/githubpro/AITechBlog/content/post/Software.md as well (it is already draft = true — verify and leave that)
Running `hugo --minify` completes with exit code 0
Verify: `grep -r 'CleanWhite' public/index.html` returns nothing (the theme demo post should not be on the front page)
Commit message: 'feat: US-004 - Refresh homepage and README, hide theme demo posts'

userStories.title: Add lightweight homepage hero copy and verify deploy build
userStories.description: As liuchenyang, I want a final pass that confirms the production build is clean and the deploy script will work, so I can confidently push to GitHub Pages.
acceptanceCriteria: Run `hugo --minify --baseURL https://lemon-little.github.io/AITechBlog/` and confirm exit code 0 with no WARN-level messages about missing layouts for any of the 7 post sections
Verify public/index.html contains '刘晨阳' or 'liuchenyang' somewhere in the rendered output (sidebar or title)
Verify public/about/index.html does NOT contain 'Huabing' or 'zhaohuabing' (use `grep -i`)

Update deploy.sh: change the commit message default from 'rebuilding site' to 'deploy: rebuild liuchenyang blog at $(date)' and confirm the script still references `hugo` correctly. Do not run the script, just edit it.
Append a 'Deployment' section at the bottom of README.md describing how to run `hugo serve` locally and how the GitHub Actions workflow auto-deploys on push to main
Commit message: 'feat: US-005 - Final build verification and deploy script polish'
